title: Comment from athenahealth, HHS-ONC-2025-0005, HHS-ONC-2025-0005-0001, 2025-23896
comment_text:
athenahealth appreciates the opportunity to respond to the proposed changes outlined in the Health Data, Technology, and Interoperability: ASTP/ONC Deregulatory Actions To Unleash Prosperity proposed rule. Please see our attached comments.
Thank you,
Jennifer Michaels

attachments.title: athenahealth comments on ONC HTI-5 Proposed Rule
